"vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-294", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay"}], "description": "## Summary

Plivo V3 signature verification canonicalized query ordering, but replay detection hashed the raw verification URL. Reordering query parameters preserved a valid signature while producing a fresh replay-cache key.

## Impact

An attacker who captured one valid signed Plivo V3 webhook could replay the same event by permuting query parameters and trigger duplicate voice-call processing.

## Affected Component

`extensions/voice-call/src/webhook-security.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `85777e726c` (`Voice Call: canonicalize Plivo V3 replay key`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00149, "percentile": 0.04503}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:50:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41395"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:50:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/85777e726cb02c01a911b3ff832ddf4d664d5c94", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Voice-call Plivo V3 webhook replay key uses unsorted URL, allowing replay via query-parameter reordering", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:21:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8689-gm9g-jgr6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Voice-call Plivo V3 webhook replay key uses unsorted URL, allowing replay via query-parameter reordering
